title: Audit CI checks for ruleset
description: Determine if Virtuus repo has CI test action/check name to require in branch ruleset.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Latest CI check names in Virtuus: check (py 3.9), check (py 3.10), check (py 3.11), check (py 3.12). There are also 'release' check runs appearing twice; recommend not requiring release checks.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Created ruleset 'main-branch-protection' for refs/heads/main with PR requirement (1 approval, dismiss stale, require last push approval), required status checks: check (py 3.9), check (py 3.10), check (py 3.11), check (py 3.12); plus block deletions and force pushes. No bypass actors.
